parents.subject: LU-19793 tcu: create a virtual MOUNT/.ltrash for subdir mount

commit.subject: LU-19961 tcu: lfs trash state returns state for symlink
commit.message:
LU-19961 tcu: lfs trash state returns state for symlink

"lfs trash state" command on symlink should not return error.
This patch fixes the error accordingly.

Add sanityn/test_118n.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Yingjin Qian <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I312a31e18aa4d3cd788d3205786d50352f72f0ba
